title: Standard M9 minimal medium
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"526qj","text":"M9 minimal media is a highly-referenced microbial growth medium used for the cultivation of E. coli. This buffered minimal microbial medium contains only salts and nitrogen, so it is traditionally supplemented with glucose, amino acids and vitamins as needed.\nM9 Minimal Medium is suitable for non-selective cultivation of Escherichia coli strains for cloning, DNA plasmid production and production of recombinant proteins. It is also suitable for selective cultivation when appropriate antibiotics are added.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":334,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bovod","text":"Suitable for non-selective cultivation of E. coli strains for cloning, DNA plasmid production and production of recombinant proteins. Also suitable for selective cultivation when appropriate antibiotics are added.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"bmnhe","text":"Prepare enough for the necessary number of experiments to perform in order to prevent batch-to-batch variation between experiments. Input chemicals should be of a certain quality in order to prevent contaminants that can impact microbial growth and selection.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"2pglj","text":"Be sure to wear appropriate PPE when working with antibiotics and chemicals. Take care when working with hot flasks and tubes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: In a bottle, fill with 800 mL deionized water

Measure and add: 60 g Sodium phosphate (dibasic) 30 g Monopotassium phosphate 5 g Sodium chloride Materials: Sodium phosphate dibasic Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #S0876 Potassium phosphate monobasic Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P5379 Sodium chloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #S9625 (CAS: 7647-14-5)
Adjust pH to pH 7.4 using hydrogen chloride or sodium hydroxide
Fill bottle to 900 mL with deionized water
Autoclave solution at 121 °C for 00:45:00
Aliquot into 100 mL units and store at 4 °C
In a bottle, fill with 400 mL deionized water
In a bottle, fill with 80 mL deionized water
Fill bottle to 500 mL with deionized water
Measure and add: 50 g Ammonium chloride Materials: Ammonium chloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A4514 (CAS: 12125-02-9)
Add 100 mL 10x Ammonium chloride solution
Sterilize with a 0.2-micron filter
Adjust pH to pH 7.4 using hydrogen chloride or sodium hydroxide
Measure and add: 12.04 g Magnesium sulfate Materials: Magnesium sulfate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M7506 (CAS: 7487-88-9)
In a bottle, fill with 80 mL deionized water
In a bottle, fill with 400 mL sterile water
Autoclave solution at 121 °C for 00:25:00
Measure and add: 7.35 g Calcium chloride Materials: Calcium chloride dihydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #C3881
Fill bottle to 100 mL with deionized water
Adjust pH to pH 7.4 using hydrogen chloride or sodium hydroxide

Add: 7.5 g Agar (Optional) 50 mL 10x M9 salt solution 10 mL Glucose solution (20%) 1000 µL Magnesium sulfate solution ( 1 Molarity (M) ) 100 µL Calcium chloride solution ( 0.5 Molarity (M) ) 500 µL Thiamine hydrochloride solution ( 1 mg/mL ) If using agar, autoclave solution with agar only, then cool to approx. 50 °C , then add the other components. Keep hot enough for the medium to stay liquid, then pour immediately. Materials: Agar Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A1296 (CAS: 9002-18-0)
Autoclave solution at 121 °C for 00:25:00
In a bottle, fill with 400 mL deionized water
Fill bottle to 500 mL with deionized water
Measure and add: 100 g Glucose Materials: Glucose Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #G7021
In a bottle, fill with 80 mL deionized water
Autoclave solution at 121 °C for 00:40:00
Fill bottle to 100 mL with deionized water
Measure and add: 100 mg Calcium chloride Materials: Thiamine hydrochloride Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #T1270 (CAS: 67-03-8)
Fill bottle to 100 mL with deionized water
Sterilize with a 0.2-micron filter
Aliquot into 1 mL aliquots, and store at -20 °C

Fill bottle to 500 mL with sterile water and store at 4 °C While it shouldn't be necessary to sterilize if working aseptically, it is possible to sterilize using a 0.2-micron filter. DO NOT AUTOCLAVE! Supplement medium with antibiotics, etc. as necessary
creator: Andreas Sagen
